text.title: Kubernetes Security Hardening Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the config artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys plus per-field constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: Required fields missing or shape violated; see VIOLATION output from the validator.

antipattern.description: pod_security_enforce other than restricted in production.
antipattern.reason: Privileged / baseline allow container escape vectors.
Default capability set keeps NET_RAW etc.
